chunks.text: 1 Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D –1221 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA 4579/2022 3.For hearing of main case 12-10-2022 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G a/w Suhbat Chandio, Assistant Director, SPSC, Regional Office, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied and will not press the instant petition if directions are given to the respondent No.3 (Controller of Examination, Sindh Public Service Commission, Hyderabad) to decide the application of the petitioner for recounting of his marks dated 17.09.2022 within a period of 15-days in accordance with law. Learned AAG along with officer present in Court records no objection to the proposition of learned counsel for the petitioner. Accordingly, instant petition stands disposed of by directing the respondent No.3 to decide the application of the petitioner dated 17.09.2022 for recounting of the marks obtained by him in accordance with law within a period of 15-days and submit such compliance report through Additional Registrar of this Court. Office is directed to communicate copy of this order to the respondents No.2&3 for compliance. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad
